name: Citizens State Bank
description_short: At 209 3rd St in Carleton, NE, Citizens State Bank offers personal and business banking.
description_long:
Citizens State Bank's branch in Carleton, NE is located at 209 3rd Street as a standalone financial institution. The branch provides traditional banking services to meet the financial needs of Carleton residents. Hours are not published online, so contact the branch directly to confirm when you plan to visit.

This Carleton location offers personal checking and savings accounts, small business banking, and personal loans. Visit the branch to discuss your banking needs and learn about services available at this specific location.

When visiting the Citizens State Bank branch in Carleton, NE, bring a government-issued ID and proof of address. This local branch serves the community with experienced banking professionals ready to help with your personal and business banking needs.
services: Online banking platform with login and account management
ATM and debit card services with fraud watch protection
pros: FDIC membership protects deposits up to $250,000 per account category
Mobile app and online banking available for remote account access and management
Full-service offerings including notary services, safe deposit boxes, and wire transfers
ATM/debit card fraud watch protection feature for account security
Automatic transfer capabilities for savings, checking, and line of credit accounts
Night depository service for after-hours cash and check deposits
Community-focused mission with emphasis on personalized customer service
cons: Website provides no information about deposit account interest rates or APYs
No details available regarding loan terms, rates, or eligibility requirements
Limited digital innovation—no mention of investment services, wealth management, or business banking specialties
Minimal transparency about service fees, minimum balances, or account requirements
Website content is sparse and does not detail competitive advantages versus larger banks
best_for: Customers seeking traditional banking relationships with personalized service in their community
Individuals prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and established financial institutions over online-only banks
Small business owners needing full-service banking with check reordering and wire transfer capabilities
Customers who value in-person banking services like notary services and safe deposit boxes
diagnosis: Citizens State Bank is best for customers in their local community who prefer traditional, relationship-based banking with full-service capabilities and FDIC protection. The primary caveat is that the bank provides minimal online transparency about specific rates, terms, and fees, requiring direct customer contact for product comparisons and detailed pricing information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Carleton, NE banking — Citizens State Bank at 209 3rd St. Personal and business banking services.
